title: India’s Richest Royal Families!
description:
India’s royal legacy isn’t just about history—it’s still incredibly wealthy.

From the royal family of Travancore and the Wadiyars of Mysore to the Mewar dynasty… and all the way to the Gaekwads of Baroda with the iconic Laxmi Vilas Palace (even bigger than Buckingham Palace).

Jaipur, Rajkot, and Jodhpur royal families continue to hold massive wealth and influence even today.

Who do you think truly deserves the top spot?

Bonus: Do you know the name of Prince Padmanabh Singh’s mother, who is also Rajasthan’s Deputy CM? Drop your answer in the comments 👇

Follow @realnehagupta for more such insights.
